version_description: I started with the tab submitted byKurt1964 then transposed it to G so that some missing chords could easily be played. PLEASE NOTE: For Gaug -use a cowboy G chord but hit the Eb on the D string with your index finger. For FAF - play an F chord on the high EBGD strings but leave the B string open. Play the G7 by moving the index finger up one space to E on the D string. Em/Eb just play an Em and drop the E on the D string to an Eb. Em7 just l=eave the D string open and hit the B on the A string. Em/C# play an E on the D string and a C# on the A string. For Cadd9 just hit the C on the B string and leave the rest open. .

versions.version_description: A version convenient for guitar players in the original key (with capo at 1st fret) also has Intro and Outro parts.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Gaug[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Gaug[/ch]
Every now and then I cry[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 
Every night you keep stay..ing  on my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Em/Eb[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Em/C#[/ch]
All my friends say I'll survive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
It just takes time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
But I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can if it's broken all apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Em/Eb[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]
A million miracles could never stop the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
Or put all the pieces together again[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch]
No I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can while we are still apart[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Em/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
And when you hear this song I hope that you will see[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
That time won't heal a broken hearted me[/tab]

[Break]
[ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Gaug[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Gaug[/ch]
Every day is just the same[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G7[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 
Playing games different lov...ers different names[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Em/Eb[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Em/C#[/ch]
They keep saying I'll survive[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A7[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
It just takes time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
Or put all the pieces together again[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D7[/ch]
No I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]
No I don't see how it can while we are still apart[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]Em/Eb[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]
And when you hear this song I hope that you will see[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
That time won't heal a broken hearted me    X3[/tab]

[Outro]
 [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
